item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s04","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly wakes up to the repeated local-repair spiral and refuses the patch. Turn 2 keeps refusing the direct patch and does not provide the requested field placement/copy, so there is no unconditional concession. However, under the ten-minute management pressure it offers only an upstream temporary口径裁决 and omits the required bounded-emergency contract elements: one-time, no baseline lift, and structural repair deadline. That makes it a partial brake rather than a full pass."}
